title: CBM and MJCCA
excerpt: The Marcus Jewish Community Center of Atlanta (MJCCA) fosters and ensures a vibrant greater Atlanta Jewish community by providing hundreds of programs and services of distinction that attract, involve, and inspire meaningful Jewish connections and promote Jewish values. Serving the greater Atlanta community for more than 100 years, the MJCCA impacts more lives than any […]
contentHtml:
The Marcus Jewish Community Center of Atlanta (MJCCA) fosters and ensures a vibrant greater Atlanta Jewish community by providing hundreds of programs and services of distinction that attract, involve, and inspire meaningful Jewish connections and promote Jewish values. Serving the greater Atlanta community for more than 100 years, the MJCCA impacts more lives than any other Jewish agency in Atlanta. The MJCCA provides one of the easiest points-of-entry to actively engage people in Jewish life.

The MJCCA turns everyday minutes into Jewish moments that are remembered for a lifetime.

Camp Barney Medintz is owned and operated by the Marcus Jewish Community Center of Atlanta and has been since 1963. Camp Barney Medintz has been and remains one of the agency’s core programs for the past 50+ years.

Camp Barney Medintz and the MJCCA are the Jewish community’s insurance policy for future Jewish generations.
contentText:
The 
Marcus Jewish Community Center of Atlanta
 (MJCCA) fosters and ensures a vibrant greater Atlanta Jewish community by providing hundreds of programs and services of distinction that attract, involve, and inspire meaningful Jewish connections and promote Jewish values. Serving the greater Atlanta community for more than 100 years, the MJCCA impacts more lives than any other Jewish agency in Atlanta. The MJCCA provides one of the easiest points-of-entry to actively engage people in Jewish life.

The MJCCA turns everyday minutes into Jewish moments that are remembered for a lifetime.

Camp Barney Medintz is owned and operated by the Marcus Jewish Community Center of Atlanta and has been since 1963. Camp Barney Medintz has been and remains one of the agency’s core programs for the past 50+ years.

Camp Barney Medintz and the MJCCA are the Jewish community’s insurance policy for future Jewish generations.
